dataPageMetaDescription: Downloadable CNC and manufacturing benchmark datasets for research, validation and industrial cost modeling.
dataPageLead: SectorCalc publishes traceable industrial benchmark data for academic citation and shop-floor validation.
datasetCncDescription: Representative CNC machining cost benchmark — cutting speed, feed rate, tool life, cycle time and job cost (24 verified sample rows).
datasetLicenseNote: Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0)
teamWilMetaTitle: Prof. Dr. Wil Schilders — ECMI President
teamWilMetaDescription: Profile of Prof. Dr. Wil Schilders, ECMI President and industrial mathematics authority cited on SectorCalc guides.
teamWilBio: Wil Schilders is President of the European Consortium for Mathematics in Industry (ECMI) and a leading authority on industrial mathematics, numerical methods and manufacturing decision models.
